features.description:
As a user of the Happilee web app
  I want to sign in with email and OTP
  So that I can reach the project listing after successful authentication

elements.name: Login with valid email navigates to OTP entry page

steps.name: I am on the auth login page
I click on Login with Email id Option
the user enters "validEmail"
I click Get Otp Button
I should be navigated to the OTP entry page

elements.name: Login with invalid email shows error and user remains on login page

steps.name: I am on the auth login page
I click on Login with Email id Option
the user enters "invalidFormat"
I click Get Otp Button
I should see an invalid email error on the login page
I should remain on the login page

elements.name: OTP entry with correct OTP navigates to project listing page

steps.name: I am on the auth login page
I click on Login with Email id Option
the user enters "validEmail"
I click Get Otp Button
I fetch otp from yopmail and enter
I click on Login Button
I verify that it is redirected to the project Page

elements.name: OTP entry with incorrect OTP shows error and user remains on OTP page

steps.name: I am on the auth login page
I click on Login with Email id Option
the user enters "validEmail"
I click Get Otp Button
I enter OTP "000000"
I click on Login Button
I should see an OTP validation error message
I should remain on the OTP entry page

elements.name: Multiple valid email attempts each navigate to OTP page

steps.name: I am on the auth login page
I click on Login with Email id Option
the user enters "validEmail"
I click Get Otp Button
I should be navigated to the OTP entry page
I return to the auth login page
I click on Login with Email id Option
the user enters "validEmail"
I click Get Otp Button
I should be navigated to the OTP entry page
I return to the auth login page
I click on Login with Email id Option
the user enters "validEmail"
I click Get Otp Button
I should be navigated to the OTP entry page

features.name: Auth Login via email (MLR login and OTP)
